title: antizoma angolensis
intro: Antizoma angolensis, also known as Kaffa wood or Antizoma, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, particularly in Angola and the Democratic Republic of Congo. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Antizoma angolensis is used to prepare various herbal remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits like reducing fever, treating wounds, and supporting immune function.
